title: Salesforce Trigger Producer Batch Worker
excerpt: I set up a Salesforce connection and have created 12 integrations, with Case object.  So far, a total Run History of 130 runs as shown in Monday.com.   Why does the Salesforce TriggerProducerBatchWorker trigger continuou…

posts.author: jpudelek (Jamie Pudelek)
posts.cookedHtml: I set up a Salesforce connection and have created 12 integrations, with Case object. So far, a total Run History of 130 runs as shown in Monday.com. Why does the Salesforce TriggerProducerBatchWorker trigger continuously fire in Salesforce? Seemingly several times per minute? We have 88,000 completed batch jobs from Monday.com in the last 7 days on TriggerProducerBatchWorker?

posts.author: puspendra.singh (Puspendra)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Jamie,

Did you get a solution to this?

Thanks
Puspendra
